name: Submit or correct a record
about: Propose a sourced event, statistic, source, or correction

## Record title

<!-- Use a factual title, not a conclusion. -->

## Date and location

- Date or date range:
- State, city, or region:

## Category

<!-- Example: Education, Press freedom, Sexual violence, Economy, Security and terror. -->

## What happened?

<!-- Write a concise, source-supported summary. -->

## Outcome or current status

<!-- Include investigation, charges, judgment, acquittal, reversal, or unresolved status. -->

## Suggested evidence status

- [ ] Official
- [ ] Court-tested
- [ ] Reported
- [ ] Alleged
- [ ] Opposition claim

## Actors

<!-- List only actors whose connection is supported by the sources. -->

## Source URLs

<!-- Add direct links. Prefer official records, court documents, NCRB, ADR, HRW, Amnesty, RSF, Reuters, BBC, The Hindu, or Indian Express. -->

## Correction details
